response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar with nearly two decades across the stack, including direct recent experience in the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) and hands-on AI-agent/MCP tooling work, which is a rare and explicitly required skill. Testing depth is evident through TDD practice, authored test frameworks, and teaching. Gaps are mostly at the framework level (no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or Vitest/Playwright mention) rather than conceptual, and appear learnable quickly given the breadth demonstrated.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js + React experience across multiple recent roles
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work, matching the required AI agent development skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test libraries, ran testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python absent from the skills list; Java experience appears dated
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not named directly, so modern JS testing tooling familiarity is inferred rather than stated
